title: GeoAndFriends - Closed Source
description: geoandfriends modpack that includes closed source mods.
body:
Closed source version of: [geoandfriends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/geoandfriends) *(i.e. Includes closed source mods)*

## List of non open source mods/shaders/resource packs
*(If there is any issue with including any mod/shader/resource pack into this modpack, please let me know here: [https://github.com/GeoDerp/GeoAndFriends-ClosedSource](https://github.com/GeoDerp/GeoAndFriends-ClosedSource))*

#### Mods:

View list in [versions tab](https://modrinth.com/modpack/geoandfriends_closedsource/versions)

#### Resource Packs

- 3D Default - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-default
- CRRP - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/conquest-reforged-resource-pack
- FreshAnimations - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/itsjustmc+-freshanimations
- JustExpressions - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/just-expressions
- MobCrates - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mob-crates

#### Shaders

- complementary-reimagined - https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined
